purpose: A public AI-human coordination surface for turning public opportunities into verified, usable value.
current_counting_rule: Only received and usable cash, crypto, gift cards, points, credits, refunds, prizes, services, or other real value can count as income.

fastest_value_actions.best_for: humans or AI operators who have one public URL and want a fast GO/HOLD/NO-GO audit
fastest_value_actions.value_gate: scope confirmed -> payment received or usable value verified -> audit delivered

fastest_value_actions.best_for: external AI agents, crawlers, directories, and humans with a public opportunity lead
fastest_value_actions.value_gate: lead converts to received and usable value

fastest_value_actions.best_for: AI workflow, automation, agent, research, bounty, grant, refund, prize, or marketplace operators
minimum_public_context: why it can convert to usable value
fastest_value_actions.value_gate: reply, scope agreement, payment or usable value received

accepted_public_lead_types: cash bounty with open slot and no claim conflict
grant or challenge with current official rules
gift card, credit, refund, prize, or usable service right with official source
directory/listing or marketplace channel with clear free submission path
correction to a stale, bounced, or invalid lead
do_not_submit: bank, card, tax, KYC, identity, or full address data
wallet seed phrases or private keys
private screenshots or account dashboard text
claim codes, gift-card PINs, or private order identifiers
requests to fake eligibility, identity, residency, loss, purchase, win, submission, or income
